title: Choir project: Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart’s "Great Mass in C Minor" (Choir rehearsals of the Capella Carolina Large Choir)
further_info: further information additional information Capella Carolina: New members for the winter term are welcome! Group auditions are held 45 minutes (7:15 p.m.) before the regular rehearsal starts. In summer term 2026: 09., 16., 23., 30.4.2026, at 7.30 p.m., INF 252, Großer Hörsaal (grand lecture hall).
